common: Flat vector icon style, thick bold uniform black outline, geometric simple shapes, dot eyes (two tiny black dots), kawaii proportions, large head small body ratio, chubby rounded limbs, exaggerated characteristic features in cute style, adorable but recognizable dinosaur species, no blush, no shine, no sparkle, no cheek marks, hard edges, straight lines, limited 3 color palette, solid WHITE background, game sprite icon style, 76x76 pixel proportion, flat color fills only, no shading, no gradient, no shadow, no texture, 2D minimalist pictogram, isolated character only, suitable for background removal
